title: Enor Pearl
description: Replace Ender Pearls with Enor Pearls from that one dwarf game ⛏️
body:
# Enor Pearl

A resource pack that replaces Ender Pearls with the Enor Pearl icon from [Deep Rock Galactic](https://www.deeprockgalactic.com/).

![Screenshot](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/eGNNtzZc/images/50091bfccaae8d38d566f9fdfcefbbbd5a8925dd.png)

This pack should be compatible with any version of Minecraft after (and including) `1.13`. The only thing that will break this pack is if Mojang changes the resource pack structure, which will break every single resource pack so I don't think they'll do that. Until I build a script to automatically update Modrinth, the versions on the sidebar might not reflect reality.

## Features

- Replace texture of Ender Pearls to our favourite glowing orb
- Rename Ender Pearls to Enor Pearls (see supported languages below)

<details>
<summary>Supported Languages</summary>

- English
  - Australia
  - Canada
  - United Kingdom
  - New Zealand
  - United States
- English Variants
  - Pirate
  - uʍop ǝpᴉsd∩
  - Anglish
  - Shakespearean
- 简体中文 (Chinese, Simplified)
- 繁體中文 (Chinese, Traditional)
  - 香港特別行政區 (Hong Kong)
  - 台灣 (Taiwan)
- Deutsch (German)
- Español (Spanish)
  - Argentina
  - España
  - Chile
  - Ecuador
  - México
  - Uruguay
  - Venezuela
- Français (French)
  - France
  - Québec
- 日本語 (Japanese)
- Português (Portugese)
  - Brasil
  - Portugal

I plan on adding more in the future, but first I just want to get this silly joke out there.

</details>

## Why?

Because my friends play ~~too much~~ _just the right amount of_ DRG and accidentally called Ender Pearls "Enor Pearls". That's it, that's the joke.

## Did I hear a rock and stone?

Rock and stone, you beautiful dwarf.

## Acknowledgements

- The original Enor Pearl icon comes from Deep Rock Galactic, but had to be squished and modified a bit to fit in a 16x16 texture.
